title: AI Research Orchestrator Settings
description: User-configurable settings for the AI Research Orchestrator plugin.

env.description: Environment variables injected into the plugin runtime.

CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS.description: Enable Agent Teams for multi-agent phase execution (required).

AUTORESEARCH_MAX_LOOPS.description: Default maximum inner-loop iterations per phase (1-10).

AUTORESEARCH_PROCESS_LANGUAGE.description: Language for process documents (e.g., zh-CN, en-US).

AUTORESEARCH_PAPER_LANGUAGE.description: Language for paper-facing documents (e.g., en-US, zh-CN).

AUTORESEARCH_DEFAULT_RESEARCH_TYPE.description: Default research type for new projects.

AUTORESEARCH_REVIEWER_MODEL.description: Model used for external review via ARIS (e.g., gpt-5.4).

AUTORESEARCH_AUTO_GITMEM.description: Automatically initialize GitMem for version tracking in new projects.
